overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077, beginning in a dark neon-lit corridor and transitioning to a bright futuristic city street. The player walks through an underpass with homeless encampments and ends at a busy intersection with holographic billboards and heavy futuristic traffic.

scene_state.functional_zone: dark futuristic corridor with red neon accent lighting

events.description: approaching bright exit doorway at end of dark corridor

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the dark corridor toward the bright exit ahead

notable_agents.action: pedestrian walking ahead toward the exit

entered.detail: tall dark walls with vertical ribbed texture lining both sides of the corridor
horizontal red neon light strips mounted on the walls emitting crimson glow
illuminated yellow lines marking the pathway on the dark floor
large rectangular exit opening with intense white light streaming in from outside

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a dark, enclosed futuristic corridor illuminated by red neon strips. The camera moves forward along yellow floor lines toward a bright exit, following a pedestrian ahead. The environment is narrow with high walls and artificial lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic urban street with pedestrian crosswalk and commercial buildings

events.description: exits dark indoor corridor into bright sunlit urban street
sudden transition from artificial red lighting to bright natural sunlight
crossing pedestrian area while futuristic vehicles drive along the street

agents.ego_description: exiting the building and walking along the busy city sidewalk among various pedestrians

notable_agents.action: woman in white jacket and shorts walking along the sidewalk
futuristic blue car driving along the city street

entered.detail: glowing green holographic display showing a map or interface floating near the building exit
tall building with dark glass windows and red structural elements
asphalt road with red painted crosswalk sections and futuristic vehicles
elevated pedestrian bridge connecting buildings above the street

segments.scene_description: The camera emerges from the dark corridor into a bright, sunlit futuristic city street. The scene features holographic advertisements, pedestrians in varied attire, and futuristic vehicles. The camera walks along the sidewalk, passing under an elevated walkway and approaching a shaded underpass area.

scene_state.functional_zone: underpass area with homeless encampment and makeshift shelters

events.description: entering covered underpass beneath the elevated highway structure
moving from bright sunlight into shadowed area under the overpass
passing through dense homeless encampment with tents and scattered debris

agents.ego_description: walking through the shadowed underpass past homeless encampments and individuals sitting against pillars

notable_agents.action: homeless person wearing white cap sitting against concrete pillar
person sitting near makeshift tent in the encampment area

entered.detail: massive concrete highway overpass creating a roof over the pathway
security fencing with coiled barbed wire atop red and yellow concrete barriers
temporary shelters and tarps set up by homeless individuals under the overpass
wall with red and white painted handprints and graffiti art

segments.scene_description: The camera moves under a massive concrete overpass into a dimly lit area populated by homeless encampments. The environment features barbed wire fences, makeshift tents, and scattered debris. The lighting is dramatically darker than the previous segment, with concrete pillars and walls covered in graffiti lining the path.

scene_state.functional_zone: busy urban intersection with heavy traffic and large digital billboards

events.description: exiting underpass into open busy intersection with heavy vehicle traffic
emerging from shadows back into bright direct sunlight
waiting at intersection as multiple futuristic vehicles pass by

agents.ego_description: approaching the busy intersection and waiting at the curb while observing the heavy traffic flow

notable_agents.action: futuristic black car with yellow accents driving through the intersection
gray van turning right at the intersection

entered.detail: massive digital advertisement towers displaying colorful holographic commercials including an orange ACE billboard
distinctive triangular-shaped skyscraper with reflective glass facade
tall palm trees lining the edge of the intersection
red and white painted pedestrian crossing lines on the asphalt

segments.scene_description: The camera emerges from the underpass into a vibrant, sunlit urban intersection filled with heavy futuristic traffic. Massive holographic billboards and advertisements cover the buildings, including a distinctive triangular glass skyscraper. The scene is bustling with vehicles moving through the intersection while pedestrians wait at the curb.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a claustrophobic, neon-lit corridor into the sprawling, vibrant chaos of a futuristic metropolis. It begins by moving forward through a dark, narrow passage illuminated by red neon strips and yellow floor lines, following a pedestrian toward a bright exit. As the camera emerges from the enclosure, the scene opens into a sunlit city street filled with holographic advertisements and futuristic vehicles before shifting into the heavy shade of a massive concrete overpass. The environment then transitions into a dimly lit underpass characterized by graffiti-covered pillars, barbed wire, and makeshift homeless encampments. Finally, the camera breaks out from the shadows into a bustling urban intersection, where heavy traffic flows beneath towering holographic billboards and a distinctive triangular glass skyscraper under a bright sky.
